rest_member.description: A member of a set is an entity of the set's content type. The set members can be permanent (in case the set is itemized) or a result of a search query (in case the set is logical).

id.description: The member id. Mandatory in the POST action, and must be an id on an existing entity of the set's content type.

description.example: Working capital management /, Preve, Lorenzo A.
description.description: The member's general description. This field is built according to each content type: - For titles: title, author - For holdings: library, location - For items: barcode - For users: full name - For PO lines: related title - For collections: name - For authorities: title - For portfolios: title - For electronic collections: name - For digital files: label
